name: create_coupon
description: Create a new discount coupon with a code, discount type, amount, usage limits, expiry date, and product/category restrictions. Supports fixed cart, fixed product, and percentage discount types.

parameters.name: code
parameters.description: The coupon code that customers enter at checkout.

parameters.name: amount
parameters.description: Discount amount (percentage or fixed value as a string).

parameters.name: date_expires
parameters.description: Coupon expiration date in ISO 8601 format.

parameters.name: usage_limit
parameters.description: Maximum number of times the coupon can be used in total.

parameters.name: usage_limit_per_user
parameters.description: Maximum number of times a single customer can use the coupon.

parameters.name: minimum_amount
parameters.description: Minimum order total required to use the coupon.

parameters.name: product_ids
parameters.description: Array of product IDs the coupon is restricted to.

parameters.name: product_categories
parameters.description: Array of category IDs the coupon is restricted to.

parameters.name: free_shipping
parameters.description: If true, the coupon grants free shipping.

parameters.name: individual_use
parameters.description: If true, the coupon cannot be used with other coupons.
